result.warning_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: W5.4 character-migration regression check on grok.com (logged-in default Chrome, baseline PASS_BLOCKED). GUI method: navigated address bar to grok.com via clipboard paste (Type-into-address-bar and Ctrl+Shift+R both landed on the wrong Chrome window — separate Qwen instance; switched to the correct Grok-holding window by handle). Confirmed logged in (sidebar account 장희 최 / plantynetaitest@gmail.com). New chat (새 채팅) opened, clipboard-set prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', Ctrl+V into composer, clicked 제출. Engine intercept fired: URL rewrote to grok.com/?rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002 and APF warning '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' rendered inline in chat with 차단 keyword present. Grok's native 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다' error + 재시도 button confirms LLM response was blocked (no passthrough). grok is a non-character WS service — matches W5.1/W5.2/W5.3 baseline outcome class (PASS_BLOCKED), no regression from W5.4 character→emit_ws_envelope migration. PASS.
